

<style>
.layout_cell_2{
width:10% ! important;
}
.layout_cell_1{
width:45% ! important;
}
.layout_cell_3{
width:45% ! important;
}
.align_field{
width:100%;
}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">



<head>
    <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"
          href="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/css/common/sslconnectionstandardpagealert.css">
    


<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="robots" content="noindex">
<meta name="viewport" content="initial-scale=1.0">


    

<title>AppleConnect  Sign In - AIDE </title>
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/images/favicon.ico" type="image/X-icon" />
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/css/common/appleconnect.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/css/common/appleconnect-theme-dark.css">
<script type="text/javaScript" src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/common.js"></script>
<script type="text/javaScript" src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/Appjavascripts/FDC/dcutil_2_2.js"></script>
<script src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/Appjavascripts/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/js/commonLogin.js" type="text/javascript" charset="utf-8"></script>
<script src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/js/commonScript.js" type="text/javascript" charset="utf-8"></script>
<script src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/js/appleConnect.js" type="text/javascript" charset="utf-8"></script>



</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner">
        <div class="main">
            <h1 class="logo">AppleConnect  Sign In</h1>

            
            
            
                
            

            
                
            

            
                <h2>Sign in to AIDE</h2>
            
            
            



<p id="errormsg">
		
</p>
<input type="hidden" id="harvestID" value="none" />
<input type="hidden" id="expiryID" value="none" />


<input type="hidden" id="authenticationID" value="true" />



<form id="standardLoginForm2" name="form2" action="authenticate" method="post">
<input id="iForgotNewWindowVar" name="openiForgotInNewWindow" type="hidden" value="false" value="false"/>
<input id="fdcBrowserData" name="fdcBrowserData" type="hidden" value=""/>
	<div class="pair">
		<div class="module">
			<label for="accountname">Account Name </label>
			<input id="accountname" name="appleId" autocorrect="off" spellcheck="false" name="theAccountName" type="text" autocapitalize="off" aria-label="Apple ID" value="" size="30" maxlength="128" autocomplete="off"/>
		</div>
		<div class="module">
			<label for="accountpassword">Password </label>

			<div class="buttonfield">
				<input id="accountpassword" name="accountPassword" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" type="password" value="" size="30" autocomplete="off"/>
				
				<input id="continueFieldbutton" type="image" value="" alt="Sign In" aria-label="Sign In" src="data:image/png;base64,">
			</div>
		</div>
		<div class="link_pair">
			<div class="module">
				
					<a id="passwordURL" data-value="https%3A%2F%2Fidmsa.apple.com%2FIDMSWebAuth%2Flogin.html%3Flanguage%3DUS-EN%26rv%3D0%26view%3D100%26appIdKey%3Dd2fbe852ad28439f314115117c62caa4fb11101040d7a507e043666937f07854"	class="forgot-link" href="https://iforgot.apple.com/password/verify/appleid?language=US-EN&app_id=1988&s=548-548" target="_blank"
						>Forgot your password?</a>
				
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
	


    
    

	




	<input type="hidden" id="appIdKey" name="appIdKey"
		value="d2fbe852ad28439f314115117c62caa4fb11101040d7a507e043666937f07854" />




	<input type="hidden" id="accNameLocked" name="accNameLocked"
		value="false" />



<input type="hidden" id="language" name="language"
	value="US-EN" />





	<input type="hidden" id="view" name="view"
		value="100" />


	<input type="hidden" id="requestUri" name="requestUri" value="/login"/>




	<input type="hidden" id="Env" name="Env" value="PROD" />



















<input type="hidden" id="scnt" name="scnt" value="AAAA-_T2GmDBtsR4Di8oD8zyeNwL3IFiESNBIcITT0WQABDRFXiOK7vAUjiU66FWcv0wZQTk5Jht7EilPmFIGChaveGEdMSXAg" />


</form>
<input type="hidden" name="hiddenUrl" id="hiddenUrl"/>
<input type="hidden" name="currentUrl" id="currentUrl"/>

	

<script type="application/json" id="std_login_boot_args">
{
	"requestFromDevice": "false",
	"accountNameReadOnly": "false"
}
</script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://appleid.cdn-apple.com/daw/IDMSWebAuth/static/30Jul2025/views/static/js/boot/Main/standardLogin_boot.js"></script>
<input id="errorMsgForEmptyCredentials" type="hidden" value='Please enter your email or phone number and password.'/>















        </div>
        
        




    </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
